ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome */,
  "assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the genome assembly */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the genome was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genome */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genome data */,
  "assembly_level" TEXT /* Level of the assembly */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the genome */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the genome is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puls" (
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PUL */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome the PUL belongs to */,
  "pul_name" TEXT /* Name of the PUL */,
  "contig_id" TEXT /* ID of the contig the PUL is located on */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the PUL on the contig */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the PUL on the contig */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of functional components in the PUL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the PUL */,
  "function" TEXT /* Primary function of the PUL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the PUL */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the PUL was last modified */,
  "annotated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last annotated the PUL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puls_contig_id FOREIGN KEY ("contig_id") REFERENCES contigs ("contig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puls_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contigs" (
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contig */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome the contig belongs to */,
  "contig_name" TEXT /* Name of the contig */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the contig */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the contig */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the contig */,
  "is_circular" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the contig is circular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cazymes" (
  "cazyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAZyme */,
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL the CAZyme belongs to */,
  "cazyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the CAZyme */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the CAZyme */,
  "function" TEXT /* Specific function of the CAZyme */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the CAZyme */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the CAZyme has been approved */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the CAZyme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cazyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cazymes_pul_id FOREIGN KEY ("pul_id") REFERENCES puls ("pul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cazymes_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "susc" (
  "susc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SusC protein */,
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL the SusC protein belongs to */,
  "susc_name" TEXT /* Name of the SusC protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Specific function of the SusC protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the SusC protein */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the SusC protein has been approved */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the SusC protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("susc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_susc_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_susc_pul_id FOREIGN KEY ("pul_id") REFERENCES puls ("pul_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "susd" (
  "susd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SusD protein */,
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL the SusD protein belongs to */,
  "susd_name" TEXT /* Name of the SusD protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Specific function of the SusD protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the SusD protein */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the SusD protein has been approved */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the SusD protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("susd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_susd_pul_id FOREIGN KEY ("pul_id") REFERENCES puls ("pul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_susd_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, bioinformatician, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the genome or PUL */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome being accessed */,
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the genome or PUL was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the platform */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pul_id FOREIGN KEY ("pul_id") REFERENCES puls ("pul_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_logs" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome being annotated */,
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL being annotated */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., CAZyme, SusC, SusD) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details of the annotation */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the annotation has been reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_pul_id FOREIGN KEY ("pul_id") REFERENCES puls ("pul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_reviewed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomes_taxa" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the taxon */,
  "lineage" TEXT /* Full taxonomic lineage of the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puls_cazymes" (
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL */,
  "cazyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CAZyme */,
  "cazyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the CAZyme */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the CAZyme within the PUL */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the CAZyme's presence in the PUL has been confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pul_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puls_susc" (
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL */,
  "susc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SusC protein */,
  "susc_name" TEXT /* Name of the SusC protein */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the SusC protein within the PUL */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the SusC protein's presence in the PUL has been confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pul_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puls_susd" (
  "pul_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PUL */,
  "susd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SusD protein */,
  "susd_name" TEXT /* Name of the SusD protein */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the SusD protein within the PUL */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the SusD protein's presence in the PUL has been confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pul_id")
)
